description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a matte black finish and a ribbed wooden fore-end for grip. The stock and fore-end are made of wood, with the stock displaying a smooth, polished surface and a dark rubber butt pad for recoil absorption. The receiver is metallic and appears robust, with visible engravings and a loading port on the underside. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, providing protection for the trigger mechanism. The shotgun's overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation except for a subtle engraving on the stock. The object is consistent with a classic urban or law enforcement shotgun, designed for reliability and ease of use.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a matte black barrel, ribbed wooden fore-end, and a polished wooden stock with a rubber butt pad. The receiver is metallic with engravings and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: A narrow side profile showing the thinness of the shotgun, with the wooden stock and fore-end visible at the ends.
description_view_1: A full side view displaying both sides of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, metallic receiver, and barrel details.
description_view_2: A narrow edge-on view emphasizing the slim profile and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_3: A mirrored side view similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the shotgun with clear visibility of the stock engraving and fore-end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
